description: Analyze the HEC-RAS unsteady simulation results for the Muncie project (Muncie.p04.hdf) to determine flow distribution. For each cross-section at the timestep with the peak total flow, calculate the percentage of flow in the Left Overbank (LOB), Main Channel, and Right Overbank (ROB). Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/flow_distribution.csv with the columns: CrossSection, Total_Flow_cms, LOB_Flow_Pct, Channel_Flow_Pct, and ROB_Flow_Pct. Additionally, generate a summary at /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/flow_split_summary.txt containing the peak timestep index used and the name of the cross-section with the highest overbank flow percentage.
